summary: SF drops formueskat publicly; Frederiksen narrows to 2 red lines (immigration, pesticideBan). EL (Dragsted) conciliatory, praises Løkke. Løkke unmoved after 4 hours: 'stadigvæk tungt ud'. Red-bloc parties systematically clearing obstacles while M holds firm.
changelog: SF dropper formueskat som krav; S indsnævrer til 2 røde linjer (udlændinge, sprøjteforbud)
EL (Dragsted) roser Løkke, kun ét bredt krav (ulighed)
Løkke fastholder skepsis efter 4 timer: 'ser stadigvæk tungt ud'
crossBlocBonus 5→6: Løkke gentager tværblok-præference efter lang forhandling

developments.description: SF (Olsen Dyhr) publicly abandons formueskat as requirement: 'vi er også villige til at kigge på andre finansieringskilder'. Previously a stated M dealbreaker.
Frederiksen names only 2 non-negotiable demands: stram udlændingepolitik and nationalt sprøjteforbud. Hans Redder (TV 2) flags conspicuous absence of formueskat, folkeskole, Arne-pension.
developments.impact: S globalHarshness 0.45→0.35; S pension weight 0.65→0.35; S fiscal weight 0.60→0.35

developments.description: Dragsted (EL) praises Løkke personally, names only one broad ultimatum (inequality), reports consensus on nature/water policy. 'Det er ikke os, der udelukker at forhandle med Løkke.'

Løkke emerges from 4-hour session: 'Det ser stadigvæk tungt ud'. Questions whether mandate can deliver 'tilstrækkelig offensiv økonomisk politik'. Reiterates 'Det bedste er at få en regering hen over midten'.
Troels Lund Poulsen sidelined after acute eye surgery (7-10 days). V absent from formation process this window.
developments.impact: No new V parameter changes (already captured in April 6 update)

developments.description: Greenland MPs (Nathanielsen, Høegh-Dam) present 5 formal demands to Frederiksen. Nathanielsen: 'svært at se blå konstellation'.
developments.impact: No parameter change (already coded with red lean; demands are S-GL bilateral, not coalition variables)

parameterChanges.justification: Frederiksen narrowed to 2 red lines; Redder: 'nødt til at strege store dele'
Conspicuously absent from Frederiksen's 2 stated red lines
Conspicuously absent from Frederiksen's 2 stated red lines
SF dropped formueskat publicly + systematic obstacle-clearing for M
Dyhr: 'villige til at kigge på andre finansieringskilder' — publicly abandoned
Dragsted praised Løkke; one broad ultimatum; consensus on nature/water
'Stadigvæk tungt ud' after 4 hrs; unmoved while all others soften
Løkke reiterated cross-bloc preference after long centre-left session

confidenceAssessment: high — SF formueskat concession and Frederiksen's 2-red-lines are first-person public statements; Løkke's posture is direct quote; Dragsted's conciliation is direct quote
